R^hl^T^r?,*6 L e g i s , a t u r e o f t h e S t a t e o f *Viab in the Fifty-sixth Year of theRepublic of India as follows:- 1. (1) This Act may be called the Punjab Labour Welfare Fund (Amendment) Act, 2005. (2) It shall come into force at once. 2. In the Punjab Labour Welfare Fund Act, i 965 (hereinafter referred to as the principal Act). in section 3, in sub-section (2) > (i) in clause ( e), the word "and" occurring at the end, shall be omitted; and (ii) in clause (f), for sign " . " occurring at the end, the sign and word " ; and" shall be substituted and thereafter, the following clause shall be inserted, namely:- "(g) contribution of employers and employees." 3. In the principal Act, after section 9, the following section shall be inserted namely:- "9-A. (1) Every employee shall contribute one rupee per month to the Fund and every employer shall, in respect of each such employee, contribute two rupees per month to the Fund. Explanation- For the purpose of sub-section (1), "employee" shall mean an employee whose name finds mention in the register of an establishment on the last working day of the month. (2) Every employer shall pay to the Fund both, his contribution and the contribution of the employee before the -- 3 of 4 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY rp^r si fifteenth day of October, for the period commencing from the 1 day of Apr,! to the 30'h day of September, and before the fifteenth day of April, for the period commencing from the 1st dav of IT Z? « T ^ °f M a r C h CVer> y e a r ' b> t r o ^ cheque or demand draft m favour of the Welfare Commissioner. (3) The employer shall be entitled to recover from the employee the employee's contribution by deduction from his wages and not otherwise; Provided that no such deduction shai 1 be made in excess of the amount oi the contribution, payable by such employee; " Provided further that if through inadvertence or on account oi some other reason, no such deduction has been made from the wages oi an employee for any month, such deduction shall be made from the wages of such employee in any subsequent month after intimation in writing to the employee and the Inspector; Provided further that it shall be no excuse for the employer for non-payment of contribution to the Fund that he had not deducted the contribution of the employee from his wages " rF.No. U-l 1020/2/2007-UTI.] B.
